#  Edit a Specification Area 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can only edit the name and description of a specification area. If you want to edit the existing specification section numbers and descriptions, see [Edit Specification Sections and Divisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/edit-spec-sections-and-divisions/).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click the **Specification Areas** page if you are already in a specification area.  
_Note:_ Each area shows the name of the area, when it was updated and created, and how many specifications it contains.
  3. Click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon on the specification area you want to edit.  

![Delete Edit Area](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1zZ0ZLOcd7AGu9ZQ9IJx0W/9a3cd239d0f4652c7e5d459a49d6e164/del.png?fm=webp)
  4. Click **Edit**.
  5. Edit the specification area name or description.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Move Specifications to Another Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/move-spec-area)
  * [Add a Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/add-a-specification-area)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-specifications)
title: Edit a Specification Area
description: To edit the name or description of a specification area in the project's Specifications tool.
